name: Kazuchimon

signature_move.name: Nitou Seirai
signature_move.description: Cuts down the enemy with the lightning swords it holds bydual wieldingthem.

description: An Ultimate Digimon that evolved by tempering its body and soul to the limit through unimaginable training. To Kazuchimon, fighting is something it has devoted everything to, and is a sacred rite that must never be desecrated. It is a natural-born warrior who is so immersed in refining its tactics and strategies that it forgets to eat and sleep, and once in battle, it turns into a raging war god and exhibits the strength to take on a thousand warriors. Its Special Moves are cutting down the enemy with the lightning swords it holds by dual wield ing them ( Nitou Seirai ), and erecting a barrier of lightning and forcing them into a one-on-one battle ( Shidou Ittetsu ). In addition, it makes sure to finish them off with its final secret technique " Shinden Shouraikou ", where it condenses the electrical energy in its surroundings and fires an ultra-high density shot of lightning.
